title: Breeze
description: A vanilla-feeling super power mod with craft-able powers!
body:
If you have any suggestions you'd like to make, please submit them [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1Vl2AR3zO10sdT6j_B2AU04fF2o1Z6UqHJJdB0Fti_jU/edit)

# **Mod Description**

Unleash powerful abilities and enhance your Minecraft experience with unique craftable items! This mod introduces special abilities that can be crafted and used to gain powerful advantages, from launching fireballs to gaining temporary creative mode. Strategically use these abilities to dominate your world!

**⸻**

# **Items & Abilities**

## **Fireball Bow**

A powerful bow that shoots fireballs instead of arrows, allowing you to rain fiery destruction upon your enemies. Perfect for long-range combat with an explosive twist!

## **Invisibility**

A cheap, one-time-use item that grants temporary invisibility, perfect for sneaky escapes or ambushing unsuspecting foes.

## **Flight**

Grants the power of flight when used. Unlike other flight-related items, this one can be used multiple times, making exploration and building easier than ever!

## **Speed**

When held in hand, this item grants a significant speed boost, allowing you to traverse the world faster or escape danger quickly.

## **Dragon**

A rare and powerful item that can only be crafted once. Upon use, it grants temporary creative mode for 60 seconds, letting you build, fly, or escape tricky situations with ease.

## **Strength**

Simply having this item in your inventory grants a strength boost, making you a force to be reckoned with in combat.

**⸻**

With these powerful abilities at your disposal, you’ll be able to conquer your world like never before. Craft wisely and use them strategically to gain the upper hand!
